name: Voruna Prime
description: Splendor and ferocity reach their savage apex in Voruna Prime. Though exalted by Orokin gold, she is more feral than ever.

abilities.name: Shroud Of Dynar
abilities.description:
(TAP) Dynar shrouds Voruna with invisibility and accelerates her speed. Invisibility ends when Voruna attacks. For a short time after invisibility ends, melee attacks have increased Critical Damage, Status Chance, Critical Chance and inflict <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status Effects. Melee kill an enemy during this time to extend the melee buff once per cast.

(HOLD) Dynar guards Voruna, increasing her Parkour Velocity.

abilities.name: Fangs Of Raksh
abilities.description:
(TAP) Raksh's fangs tear into your enemies. 5 random Status Effects are applied at 10 Stacks each on an enemy. On target's death, spread the Status Effects to other nearby enemies.

(HOLD) Raksh guards Voruna with Status Effect resistance.

abilities.name: Lycath's Hunt
abilities.description:
(TAP) Lycath hunts to sustain the pack. Enemies killed by melee attacks drop health orbs and enemies killed by headshots drop energy orbs. Increase the duration of Lycath’s hunt by killing enemies affected by 5 or more Status Effects.

(HOLD) Lycath guards Voruna with increased Heavy Attack efficiency.

abilities.name: Ulfrun's Descent
abilities.description:
(TAP) Voruna drops to all fours and prepares 5 brutal charges that lock onto enemies. Ulfrun, the most powerful wolf, leads the attack as Voruna dashes toward her target. The pack deals increased damage to targets and nearby enemies that are inflicted by Status Effects. Lethal attacks double the damage of Voruna's remaining charges.

(HOLD) Ulfrun guards Voruna. If Voruna falls during this time, Ulfrun dies in her place.

languages.description: Pracht und Wildheit erreichen mit Voruna Prime ihren Höhepunkt. Obwohl sie durch Orokin Gold veredelt wurde, ist sie wilder denn je.
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: Splendeur et férocité atteignent leur paroxysme sauvage avec Voruna Prime. Bien qu'exaltée par l'or Orokin, elle est plus redoutable que jamais.
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: Splendore e ferocia raggiungono il loro apice brutale con Voruna Prime. Sebbene elevata dall'oro Orokin, è più selvaggia che mai.
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: 화려함과 맹렬함이 보루나 프라임 안에서 어우러져 그 야만성의 정점에 도달합니다. 오로킨의 금으로 승격되었을지언정, 그녀는 그 어떤 때보다도 더욱 야성을 깃들이고 있습니다.
languages.name: 보루나 프라임

languages.description: El esplendor y la ferocidad alcanzan su brutal apogeo con Voruna Prime. Aunque elevada por el oro orokin, es más salvaje que nunca.
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: 辉煌与凶猛在 Voruna Prime 身上达到了顶峰。虽然她被奥罗金黄金所装饰，却比以往任何时候都更具野性。
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: В Воруне Прайм великолепие и свирепость достигают своего апогея. Несмотря на то, что она облагорожена золотом Орокин, она стала ещё более дикой, чем когда-либо.
languages.name: Воруна Прайм

languages.description: 壮麗さとどう猛さの頂点、それがVoruna Prime。オロキンの黄金で縛られながらも、その凶暴さは色褪せない。
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: Splendor i dzikość sięgają apogeum w Vorunie Prime. Choć okryta złotem Orokin, jest jeszcze bardziej nieokiełznana niż kiedykolwiek.
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: Esplendor e ferocidade atingem seu ápice selvagem na Voruna Prime. Embora exaltada pelo ouro Orokin, ela está mais selvagem do que nunca.
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: 華麗與凶殘在 Voruna Prime 身上達到了野性的極致。縱使披掛著 Orokin 黃金，她卻比以往更顯狂野。
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: ความงดงามและความดุร้ายเพิ่มระดับถึงขีดสุดเมื่ออยู่ในร่าง Voruna Prime แม้จะตกแต่งด้วยทองคำ Orokin แต่กลับทำให้ดุร้ายยิ่งกว่าเดิม
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: Voruna Prime, ihtişam ve vahşetin doruk noktasıdır. Orokin altınlarıyla yüceltilmiş olmasına rağmen, o her zamankinden daha vahşidir.
languages.name: Voruna Prime

languages.description: Воруна-прайм — вершина еволюції розкішних та лютих хижаків. Ще більше дикої смертоносності, убраної в благородний лиск орокінського золота.
languages.name: Воруна-прайм
